qry:select.name: qry_columnas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ31_GRUPO_var.c_columna, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo, LIQ31_GRUPOS.d_grupo FROM LIQ31_GRUPOS, LIQ31_GRUPO_var, LIQ09_VARIABLES JOIN LIQ31_GRUPOS.oi_grupo INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_var.oi_grupo, LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_var.oi_variable WHERE LIQ31_GRUPOS.oi_grupo = {#FILTRO:@oi_grupo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_EMPRESA
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT O03.c_empresa as c_empresa, O03.d_empresa as d_empresa, L19.c_liquidacion as c_liquidacion, L19.d_titulo as d_titulo, L19.e_periodo as e_periodo, L99.oi_liquidacion_ddo FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION AS L99, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS L19, ORG03_EMPRESAS as O03 JOIN L99.c_liquidacion INNER L19.c_liquidacion, O03.c_empresa INNER L99.c_empresa WHERE L19.oi_liquidacion = {#FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion} and L99.c_estado = \'F\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_personas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT L97.e_numero_legajo , L97.d_ape_y_nom , L20.oi_tot_liq_per FROM LIQ99_RECIBOS AS L99 , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS L20 , LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP AS L97 JOIN L99.oi_tot_liq_per INNER L20.oi_tot_liq_per , L20.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER L97.oi_per_emp_ddo WHERE L99.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_variables
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT {%=#FILTRO:@c_columnas%}, L97.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, L97.D_APE_Y_NOM FROM LIQ20_VAR_GR_CONC AS V, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP AS L97 JOIN LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per INNER V.oi_tot_liq_per, L97.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo WHERE V.oi_tot_liq_per = {#PARAM:@oi_tot_liq_per} and V.c_grupo = {#FILTRO:@c_grupo}
')/ROWS/ROW
